'''Ren S'orn''' was the son of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Uta S'orn]]. He was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force sensitive]] and was identified at a young age for [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] training. Senator S'orn, not wanting to part with her son refused to allow him to go and train within the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]].

With the knowledge that he could have become a powerful Jedi, Ren was unable to cope with the premonitions and [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] struggles that he was unprepared for. Becoming moody and depressed, he eventually abandoned his mother and was hired by [[Jenna Zan Arbor]], who ran tests on him. Eventually, after trying to escape, he died unexpectedly on [[Simpla-12]], where he was found drained of [[Blood/Legends|blood]].

An investigation into Ren's death was made under [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Yur T'aug]], but had been dropped at the request of the grieving Senator S'orn. Zan Arbor had regretted the loss of her friend's son ever since.
